response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, plus strong architectural awareness and open-source contributions — but his title of 'Staff Software Engineer' and 10+ years of senior roles contradict the entry-level job description, and his lack of explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js mention raises uncertainty about alignment with core requirements; high on-site presence is also a concern given his Berlin-based remote-friendly profile.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple production systems
Proven full-stack experience with React, REST APIs, and scalable web architectures
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking with GISCollective and tooling
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role; likely seeking senior responsibilities
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Nest.js — key required technologies
German language skill is only 'basic' despite high on-site requirement in Berlin
